name: Daehyun Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daehyun Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells women's clothing in South Korea. The company markets its products under various brand names, including Blu Pepe, CC Collect, Zooc, Dewl, and Mojo S Phine. It also operates Envy department stores. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
